title: Reveal Hidden Raiders
description: Gives the last few raiders of each wave a glowing effect to prevent them from getting lost in corners or caves
body:
Gives the last few raiders of each wave a glowing effect to prevent them from getting lost in corners or caves.

# Features:
- Red-colored glowing effect applied to raiders when they are one of the last two raiders of the wave
- Only applies to raiders that are currently part of a raid
- Settings customizable with Mod Menu (singleplayer) and /revealhiddenraiders (server)
